-- 1 of 10 --

How to Scale…
▪ 	Sometimes you have to do things that don’t scale
(especially when you’re starting out)…
▪ 	like personally answering emails
▪ 	or responding to comments
▪ 	or calling people
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 10 --

How to Scale…
▪ 	Some things end up scaling
▪ 	…like sending handwritten thank you cards
▪ 	Some things you do to…
▪ 	create an impact
▪ 	create the impression or positioning you want
▪ 	provide the service level you want
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 10 --

Your Strength Becomes your Weakness
▪ 	For example… marketing is my strength
▪ 	It’s difficult to hire someone that can perform at my level
▪ 	It’s hard to hand that off, so I become the bottleneck
▪ 	You have to get ahead of it and find great people because
you can’t scale up your business if you’re the only one
that can do your job
▪ 	jeffwalker.com/careers
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 10 --

Scaling with a team
▪ 	This is one of the big shifts in the last few years in my
industry
▪ 	I was slow to do this
▪ 	It takes effort - but it’s super rewarding
▪ 	It’s the only way you’re really going to grow
▪ 	jeffwalker.com/careers
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 10 --

Scaling your Ad SPEND
▪ 	Free traffic has a cost (time) and it generally doesn’t scale
▪ 	When you can get a return on advertising investment
payoff - then you can start to scale with your ads
▪ 	Your cost of acquisition is critical
▪ 	It will increase after the low-hanging fruit
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 10 --

Market Refresh and Churn
▪ 	Market refresh: turnover - how many come into the
market - and how many leave the market
▪ 	Your market refresh/churn rates affect:
▪ 	acquisition (getting new prospects)
▪ 	retention (in a continuity program for example)
▪ 	Every market is different
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 10 --

Scale with new offers
▪ 	Add a new product
▪ 	Eben Pagan doubled his business by adding one new
product
▪ 	We added Launch Club
▪ 	Think up-sells, sequential offers, cross-sells, etc.
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 10 --

Scale with new MARKETING
▪ 	Add a launch sequence if you’re doing webinars
▪ 	Add a webinar if you’re doing launch sequences
▪ 	Add a second launch sequence or second webinar
▪ 	Give people more chances to buy
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 10 --

Every business has risk points…
▪ 	Often they’re really hard to see
▪ 	Kodak
▪ 	Blockbuster
▪ 	Ask: Why wouldn’t I buy my business?
▪ 	Do your best to mitigate weak points/risk points
BONUS - The Secrets of Leverage and Scale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
